parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='GENERATING', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messenger_source: 'discord', messenger_channel_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.channel_id, job_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.job_id, audio_content_b64: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.audio_content_b64, audio_file_path: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.audio_file_path, filename: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.filename, caption: ($('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.auto_trigger_wf12 ? '🔊 TTS 완료. 영상 제작 모드로 WF-12(HeyGen)를 자동 실행합니다.' : '🔊 TTS 완료본입니다. 일반 승인 또는 고화질 승인을 선택하세요.'), include_wf12_button: (!$('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.auto_trigger_wf12) }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='APPROVED', audio_url='{{ $('Send TTS Audio to Gateway').item.json.s3_uri || $('Send TTS Audio to Gateway').item.json.audio_url || $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.audio_file_path }}', script_json = COALESCE(script_json, '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('media_names', COALESCE(script_json->'media_names', '{}'::jsonb) || jsonb_build_object('audio_filename', '{{ $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.filename }}')), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.job_id, channel_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.channel_id, user_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.user_id, audio_url: $('Send TTS Audio to Gateway').item.json.audio_url }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ messenger_source: 'discord', messenger_channel_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.channel_id, text: '🔊 TTS 완료. 오디오 확인 후 버튼으로 WF-12 진행 여부를 선택하세요.' }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='FAILED', error_message='WF-11 TTS 실패 [{{ $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.error_type || 'tts_server_runtime_error' }}]: {{ $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.error }}', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.job_id }}'

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ messenger_source: 'discord', messenger_channel_id: $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.channel_id, text: '❌ TTS 생성에 실패했습니다.
Job ID: ' + $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.job_id.substring(0,8) + '
오류 유형: ' + ($('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.error_type || 'tts_server_runtime_error') + '
오류: ' + $('RunPod TTS + Save WAV').item.json.error }) }}
